title: Parking Lot Vehicle Break-In
description: An alert triggers on CAM-01 showing the parking lot. The agent must inspect the frame, detect the person tampering with a vehicle, classify the risk, and escalate.

frames.description: Parking lot at night. Several cars parked. One person walking near entrance. No anomaly visible.
Parking lot at night. A person is attempting to break into a vehicle near the entrance using a tool. Car alarm lights are flashing.
Parking lot at night. The suspect has opened the vehicle door and is reaching inside. Car alarm lights visible.
